title: Kalyan Jewellers is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Kalyan Jewellers is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kalyan Jewellers! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kalyan Jewellers:
Kalyan Jewellers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers!
